title: liyliyth #3917
definition:
1) "Lilith", name of a female goddess known as a night demon who haunts the
    desolate places of Edom
    1a) might be a nocturnal animal that inhabits desolate places
nasbUsage:

    desolate places of Edom
    1a) might be a nocturnal animal that inhabits desolate places
